betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§f§6ME Storage Cells §fstore items in the ME network. Four tiers:

§b1k ME Storage Cell — 32 types, 63 bytes each
§b4k ME Storage Cell — 128 types, 256 bytes each
§b16k ME Storage Cell — 512 types, 1024 bytes each
§b64k ME Storage Cell — 2048 types, 4096 bytes each

§fCraft cells by combining the matching §6Storage Component §fwith a §6ME Storage Housing §f(material:39) in a crafting table. The Housing is reusable when the cell is disassembled.

§cWarning: §fEach cell has a limited number of item types. Use multiple smaller cells instead of one large cell for better type distribution.
